annual_rate.notes: Post-judgment interest under Ohio Rev. Code §1343.03(B), at the rate the Ohio Tax Commissioner sets annually under §5703.47 (the federal short-term rate for the year, rounded, + 3 percentage points) — currently 7% for 2026. Simple interest. A written contract specifying a different rate controls (§1343.03(A)). Verify the current year at tax.ohio.gov; not legal advice.
